description: Model a 5m x 4m elevated timber pergola roof plane (approx 3m high) with a 1.5m x 1.5m corner cutout (e.g., in the Northeast corner) to avoid a tree. Use the Skelion plugin to lay out a flush solar array (0° tilt) on this notched roof plane with 100mm row spacing and 100mm module spacing so there are clear gaps between all panels. Do NOT place panels in the 1.5m x 1.5m cutout area. Edit the generated Skelion solar panel component to apply a translucent/glass material so the panels appear semi-transparent. Save the final model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\pergola_tree_cutout.skp'.
